title: Trump discussed Iran's Hormuz Strait proposal with top aides, White House says
summary_full: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.
summary_public: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.
